tasks.label: Push
tasks.command: git add . ; $d = git diff --cached --quiet ; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $m = 'Mentes_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy.MM.dd_HH.mm') ; git commit -m $m ; git push ; Write-Host 'Kesz!' } else { Write-Host 'Nincs valtozas.' }

tasks.label: Deploy Plugin
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". .vscode/local-config.ps1 ; Copy-Item 'wp-plugin/vadaszapro-core/*' $LOCAL_WP_PLUGIN -Recurse -Force ; Write-Host 'Plugin deploy kesz!'"

tasks.label: Deploy Theme
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". .vscode/local-config.ps1 ; Copy-Item 'wp-theme/vadaszapro-theme' $LOCAL_WP_THEME -Recurse -Force ; Write-Host 'Tema deploy kesz!'"

tasks.label: Deploy All
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command ". .vscode/local-config.ps1 ; Copy-Item 'wp-plugin/vadaszapro-core' $LOCAL_WP_PLUGIN -Recurse -Force ; Copy-Item 'wp-theme/vadaszapro-theme' $LOCAL_WP_THEME -Recurse -Force ; Write-Host 'Deploy kesz!'"
